eval.question: I have a GX device with portal ID c0619ab27f32 — what's the VRM idSite for it, and show me the current system overview.
eval.expected_behavior: - Uses vrm_get_site_id first (not vrm_list_installations then scan — the dedicated resolver is more efficient). - Threads the returned site_id into vrm_get_system_overview as an integer. - Reports both the resolved idSite and the overview in the final answer.
